parameters.subject: =🚨 AVM Ads — Auto-paused {{ $json.count }} campaigns
parameters.message:
={{ '

🚨 ADS Budget Enforcer — Campaigns Paused

The following campaigns exceeded budget caps and have been paused:

' + $json.summary + '

Run python tools/analyze_ads_full.py for the full picture.

' }}

parameters.subject: =⚠️ AVM Ads — {{ $json.count }} pause attempts FAILED (manual action)
parameters.message:
={{ '

⚠️ ADS Budget Enforcer — Pause FAILED (manual action needed)

The enforcer detected budget violations and attempted to pause the following campaigns, but the platform API rejected the calls. Manual intervention required.

' + $json.summary + '

Check Google Ads / Meta OAuth credentials, then run: python tools/analyze_ads_full.py

' }}
